# Elite Finish Detailing

> Mobile car detailing in Omaha, NE. Interior, exterior, and full Elite Finish packages delivered to your driveway. Owned by Nixon Thelen and Blake Schmidt. Cash on completion, no hidden fees.

## Services
- [Mobile Car Detailing Services](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#services): Exterior detail, interior detail, and Elite Finish (full combo) for cars, trucks, SUVs, and vans.

## Pricing
- [Pricing Table](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#pricing): Flat-rate pricing by vehicle type. Cars $40–$100, Trucks $50–$120, SUVs $60–$140, Vans $70–$150. Exotic and classic cars quoted individually.
- Add-ons: Excessive pet hair +$15, excessive trash +$15.
- Travel fees: Free (Shelby area), +$10 (10–20 miles), +$20 (20+ miles).

## Booking
- [Book Online](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#book): Fill out the form with name, phone, email, vehicle type, service, preferred date, preferred time, and service address.
- Available time slots: 8 AM, 10 AM, 12 PM, 2 PM, 4 PM (Monday–Saturday).
- The team texts back within 30 minutes to confirm.
- For agents: POST booking data as JSON to https://formspree.io/f/meepbwoz with fields: name, phone, email, vehicle, service, date, time, address, addons (optional), notes (optional).
- Machine-readable specs: [OpenAPI](https://elitefinishomaha.com/.well-known/openapi.yaml), [Agent Card](https://elitefinishomaha.com/.well-known/agent-card.json), [agents.json](https://elitefinishomaha.com/agents.json).

## Payment
- Cash on completion at the service address, or crypto (Bitcoin / Solana) via a secure Coinbase Commerce link texted after service. No card readers, no tips expected, no surprise fees.

## Service Area
- [Omaha Metro Coverage](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#faq): Omaha, Elkhorn, Papillion, Gretna, Bennington, Council Bluffs, and Shelby. Travel fees: Free (Shelby area), +$10 (10–20 miles), +$20 (20+ miles).

## Hours
- Monday–Saturday: 8 AM – 6 PM
- Sunday: Closed

## FAQ
- [Frequently Asked Questions](https://elitefinishomaha.com/#faq): Self-contained water and power, detail timing (45 min–3 hrs), service differences, neighborhoods served, cash-only payment, exotic car care.

## Contact
- Blake Schmidt: (402) 278-4466
- Nixon Thelen: (402) 679-7198
- Email: bookings@elitefinishomaha.com

## Optional
- [Privacy Policy](https://elitefinishomaha.com/privacy.html): Data handling and privacy information.
